title: Darkness and Light
description: The resource pack "Darkness and Light" adds 10 new textures and 4 models for the netherite sword. And also for other items. via custom_model_data
body:
## 📖 What's this Resource pack
This resource pack adds new item variations: 
- these are 14 swords,
- 3 spears, 
- 2 new plates
- and masks of Light and Darkness.

![On the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ddbb831395d5326c2082f74c1ab0fb2bc7a25c6_0.webp)

all this is done through custom_model_data. Each item has its own name and its own custom_model_data, which will be listed below.
## **The Name and the command to issue the item.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- /give @p minecraft:netherite_sword[minecraft:custom_model_data=1,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"The Blade of Matter","color":"red","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![The Blade of Matter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1e0fcda4e165a4c41dc09545b25a5facf26c421_0.webp)
### The Blade of Matter

-   /give @p minecraft:netherite_sword[minecraft:custom_model_data=5,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"The Blade of Matter","color":"dark_red","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![The blade of the Mother little covered by darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40683ce8c52ed089e89ad5d39e3e1bb1825e7922_0.webp)
### The blade of the Mother little covered by darkness

- /give @p minecraft:netherite_sword[minecraft:custom_model_data=6,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"The Blade of Matter","color":"dark_red","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![The Mother's blade is half covered in darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d85bbf3b1a783ff335c7c5a12ca27384984ca07_0.webp)
### The Mother's blade is half covered in darkness

- /give @p minecraft:netherite_sword[minecraft:custom_model_data=7,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"The Blade of Matter","color":"#030303","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![The Mother's blade is covered in darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bc15a32f14f96b78370f30bf8b0b74cf16c8dab_0.webp)
### The Mother's blade is covered in darkness

- /give @p minecraft:netherite_sword[minecraft:custom_model_data=15,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"True from Blade of Matter","color":"red","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![True from Blade of Matter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ea3fbdbe397d4988ca9b161dd059c0fe3fd019_0.webp)
### True from Blade of Matter

## **Spear Acceptance**
- /give @p minecraft:netherite_axe[minecraft:custom_model_data=3,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Spear Acceptance","color":"#B5B5B5","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![Spear Acceptance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a12705f77a963f53f5da1e6c84e6d551e9b7f78_0.webp)

### The Spear that Embraced Light
- /give @p minecraft:netherite_axe[minecraft:custom_model_data=1,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Spear Embraced Light","color":"#FFF5C2","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![The Spear that Embraced Light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db554e302b88dc0778fb1247b14d0898e8d4728_0.webp)

### The Spear that Embraced Darkness
- /give @p minecraft:netherite_axe[minecraft:custom_model_data=2,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Spear Embraced Darkness","color":"#00000","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![The Spear that Embraced Darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41105f58940c36f9d07a08b0ef8464dca2c051a7_0.webp)

- /give @p minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=3,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Mask Darkness","color":"#00000","italic":false}',minecraft:unbreakable={}]![Mask of Darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54c89679da411d6a41e365e834e517f62420907c_0.webp)

## Mask of Light

### Dark Plate
- /give @p minecraft:music_disc_pigstep[minecraft:custom_model_data=2,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Dark Plate","color":"#00000","italic":false}']![Dark Plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa3c6b06430b432116620ad5c44aa849c165b0f4_0.webp)

### Bright Record
- /give @p minecraft:music_disc_pigstep[minecraft:custom_model_data=1,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Bright Record","color":"#FFF5C2","italic":false}']![Bright Record](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e0076b7d5f75b4ff0f2a8a0c0edd1f5514b60cd_0.webp)

### Bright Crystal
- /give @p minecraft:diamond[minecraft:custom_model_data=2,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Bright Crystal","color":"#FFF5C2","italic":false}']![Bright Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d475130384cad120585ce4eb69223002e58201_0.webp)

### The Dark Crystal
- /give @p minecraft:diamond[minecraft:custom_model_data=1,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Dark Crystal","color":"#00000","italic":false}']![Dark Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af47bb8f7bcb9ee69192a976f83302832f5a7213_0.webp)

### An Empty Crystal
- /give @p minecraft:diamond[minecraft:custom_model_data=3,minecraft:item_name='{"text":"Empty crystal","color":"#F5F5F5F","italic":false}']![Empty crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af69a8820d74f46044e76400ad5dcf153ec894ff_0.webp)
</details>


## What is this Resource Pack for?
- It will be useful for game in teams.
- It is also suitable if you want to learn how to create similar resource packs.
## ⚙️How do I add a resource pack to the game?
1.Download this resource Pack.

2.Open the .minecraft
folder.

3. In it, open the resourcepack folder.
4. And move th  Darkness and Light to this folder.
## ⚙️Activation in the game. 
- Go to settings, then resource sets and activate Darkness and Light.
